messages.content:
YOUR TASK: Research the 3 listed pending companies. For each row: fetch_row_sources, read the snippets, then write_row with fields synthesized in your own words from those snippets. The workflow tools own lock, fetch, CAS writes, citations, freshness, status, and release — your job is the research content.

For each listed row, in order: (1) call fetch_row_sources, (2) READ the returned source snippets,
(3) call write_row with the four fields written IN YOUR OWN WORDS, grounded ONLY in those snippets.
If a figure (funding, headcount) is not present in the snippets, write "not disclosed in the cited sources"
rather than inventing one. Process every row, then stop.
Rows to process:
  rc_anthropic | company=Anthropic | status=pending
  rc_ramp | company=Ramp | status=pending
  rc_mercury | company=Mercury | status=pending
